name: Cooler Master MasterBox NR200P V2 Mini-ITX Computer Case - White - Tempered / Vented Panel - 120mm Bottom Fan - Custom PCIe 4.0 Riser Cable - GPU Support Bracket - USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 Type C - 2x USB 3.0 - HD Audio (NR200PV2-WCNN-S00)

description: A compact Mini-ITX case in white with tempered glass panel and PCIe 4.0 riser cable, designed for small-form-factor gaming builds.
